title: SOC Investigator config
description: Tenant-specific configuration for the soc-investigator skill. No secrets: the VirusTotal API key is read from the VT_API_KEY environment variable.

iocs.description: Indicators of compromise to hunt for. Provide inline lists and/or point ioc_file at a JSON/newline file.

ioc_file.description: Optional path to an extra IOC source: either a JSON object {domains,urls,hashes} or a newline-delimited text file (auto-classified by shape).

time_window_days.description: Look-back window for hunting queries -> ago(Nd).

machine_groups.description: One generated Defender query (and one exported CSV) per entry. Generalizes the fixed '7 files' — declare as many or few groups as you need.

name.description: Group label; used in the output filename.

filter.description: A KQL boolean predicate appended as a `| where` clause, e.g. DeviceType == "Server".
